category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Uzbekistan, covering UZRTC radio type approval and UzStandard (Gosstandart) Certificate of Conformity requirements. Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member — EAC marking does not apply.

title.en: China-to-Uzbekistan Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (UZRTC / Gosstandart)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入乌兹别克斯坦：UZRTC / Gosstandart合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入烏茲別克：UZRTC / Gosstandart合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Uzbekistan requirements under UZRTC (Uzbekistan Agency for Radio Frequencies and Television/Radio Broadcasting — O'zbekiston Respublikasi Radio Chastotalari va Teleko'rsatuv-Eshittirish Agentligi) and UzStandard / Gosstandart (Agency for Technical Regulation, Standardization and Metrology), covering UZRTC radio type approval and frequency permit, UzStandard Certificate of Conformity (Sertifikat Sootvetstviya) based on O'z DSt / GOST-aligned standards, electrical safety for the 220 V/50 Hz Type C/F grid, local importer requirements, and Uzbekistan cybersecurity obligations under Law No. ZRU-764 (2022). Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member — EAC marking does not apply and does not substitute for Uzbek conformity certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与乌兹别克斯坦UZRTC（无线电频率及电视广播机构）及UzStandard / Gosstandart（技术法规、标准化与计量机构）要求的差距对照，涵盖UZRTC无线电型号核准及频率许可、基于O'z DSt / GOST对标标准的UzStandard合格证书（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）、220V/50Hz C/F型电气安全、当地进口商要求，及第ZRU-764号法律（2022）下的乌兹别克斯坦网络安全义务。乌兹别克斯坦非EAEU成员，EAC标志不适用。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與烏茲別克UZRTC（無線電頻率及電視廣播機構）及UzStandard / Gosstandart（技術法規、標準化與計量機構）要求的差距對照，涵蓋UZRTC無線電型號核准及頻率許可、基於O'z DSt / GOST對標標準的UzStandard合格證書（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）、220V/50Hz C/F型電氣安全、當地進口商要求，及第ZRU-764號法律（2022）下的烏茲別克網路安全義務。烏茲別克非EAEU成員，EAC標誌不適用。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Uzbekistan's regulatory frameworks for wireless devices are subject to change as the country continues to develop its technical regulation system, and enforcement practices may differ from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant authorities (UZRTC, UzStandard / Gosstandart) before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。乌兹别克斯坦无线设备监管框架随该国技术法规体系的持续发展可能有所变化，实际执法可能与已发布规定存在差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格监管专业人士及相关主管机构（UZRTC、UzStandard / Gosstandart）核验现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。烏茲別克無線設備監管框架隨該國技術法規體系的持續發展可能有所變化，實際執法可能與已發布規定存在差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格監管專業人士及相關主管機構（UZRTC、UzStandard / Gosstandart）核驗現行要求。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices entering Uzbekistan require UZRTC radio type approval and frequency permit (mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT radio equipment) plus a UzStandard Certificate of Conformity (Sertifikat Sootvetstviya) issued by an accredited certification body under O'z DSt / GOST-aligned technical regulations. Uzbekistan is not an EAEU member — the EAC mark does not apply and does not substitute for Uzbek conformity certification. Electrical safety testing is required for the 220 V/50 Hz Type C/F grid. A local authorised importer or agent is mandatory. Chinese CCC, SRRC, FCC, and CE documentation are not recognised and do not replace UZRTC or UzStandard approvals.
answer_first.zh: 进入乌兹别克斯坦的无线设备须取得UZRTC无线电型号核准及频率许可（适用于所有Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网无线设备），并由认可认证机构依据O'z DSt / GOST对标技术法规颁发UzStandard合格证书（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）。乌兹别克斯坦非EAEU成员，EAC标志不适用，不可替代乌兹别克合规认证。须按220V/50Hz C/F型电网进行电气安全测试。须有当地授权进口商或代理。中国CCC、SRRC、FCC及CE文件不被承认，不可替代UZRTC或UzStandard核准。
answer_first.zht: 進入烏茲別克的無線設備須取得UZRTC無線電型號核准及頻率許可（適用於所有Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網無線設備），並由認可認證機構依據O'z DSt / GOST對標技術法規頒發UzStandard合格證書（Sertifikat Sootvetstviya）。烏茲別克非EAEU成員，EAC標誌不適用，不可替代烏茲別克合規認證。須按220V/50Hz C/F型電網進行電氣安全測試。須有當地授權進口商或代理。中國CCC、SRRC、FCC及CE文件不被承認，不可替代UZRTC或UzStandard核准。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
